data.content: Replaced heuristic text-based terminal detail filter with event-type-based filtering. formatStreamEvent now returns { text, isDetail }, and the terminal manager emits stdout_detail events for tool results/stream_events/metadata. Terminal panel skips stdout_detail when detail toggle is off. Fixed codex normalizer: command_execution item.started now produces assistant-type messages with tool_use blocks so action headers appear for all agents. Removed dead code: terminal-detail-filter.ts and terminal-stream-visibility.ts. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 156 test files / 2150 tests, build). Pushed to origin/main as 0c931afdd46f.
